title: Tick Control in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn | $125–$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Starting at $125. Same-day service available.
intro: Bensonhurst's tree-lined streets, proximity to parks like Calvert Vaux Park, and multi-family homes create ideal environments for ticks to thrive. Our professional tick control services protect Bensonhurst families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses year-round. With treatments ranging from $125 to $325, we provide effective, affordable protection tailored to your property's needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Bensonhurst homeowners for years with targeted tick treatments that address the unique challenges of Brooklyn's residential neighborhoods. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products safe for children and pets, with flexible scheduling to accommodate busy families in this vibrant community.
localContext: From the private yards of single-family homes along Bay Parkway to the shared green spaces surrounding Bensonhurst's characteristic brick apartment buildings, ticks can inhabit any outdoor area. The neighborhood's proximity to Shore Parkway and recreational areas makes regular tick prevention especially important for residents who enjoy outdoor activities.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Bensonhurst?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Bensonhurst typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in late spring and summer. However, ticks can be active during warmer winter days, so year-round vigilance is recommended, especially if you have pets or children who play outdoors.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Bensonhurst?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Bensonhurst range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, tick infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide ongoing protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We recommend keeping pets and children inside during application and for 2-4 hours after treatment until the product has dried completely.

faqs.question: How often should I get tick control treatment in Bensonhurst?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend tick control treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak season (April-October). Properties near parks, wooded areas, or with heavy vegetation may benefit from more frequent treatments. We'll assess your specific situation and recommend a customized treatment schedule.
